Table of Contents

Class UsuarioDTO

Namespace
Service.DTO
Assembly
Service.dll

Data Transfer Object representing an authenticated or listed application user.

public class UsuarioDTO
Inheritance
object
UsuarioDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Extension Methods
PermisoHelper.TienePermiso(UsuarioDTO, string)

Remarks

Carries the user's permission tree (Permisos) from the service layer to the UI. UI components use TienePermiso(UsuarioDTO, string) on this DTO to drive button visibility and access control without hitting the database again.

Constructors

UsuarioDTO() 

public UsuarioDTO()

Properties

Estado

Account status string (e.g., "Activo", "Inactivo").

public string Estado { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Id

Unique identifier of the user.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Permisos

Permission tree roots assigned to this user (mix of Familia and Patente nodes).

public List<Acceso> Permisos { get; set; }

Property Value

List<Acceso>

RolNegocio

Business role label derived from the user's family assignments (e.g., "Administrador", "Operador").

public string RolNegocio { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Username

Login name.

public string Username { get; set; }

Property Value

string
